title: Manual Handling (Q&A)
description: Learn the principles of manual handling, safe lifting techniques, and moving equipment.

questions.prompt: Briefly describe some of the reasons why companies provide manual handling training.
questions.exampleContext: Improper lifting is a leading cause of workplace absence. Why do companies invest time and money into training employees on safe manual handling techniques?

questions.prompt: Briefly explain when you would use a pallet truck.
questions.exampleContext: Imagine you need to move a stack of 50 heavy boxes across the warehouse floor. Why would a pallet truck be the most appropriate equipment for this task?

questions.prompt: Briefly explain when you would use a sack barrow/truck.
questions.exampleContext: You need to move a tall, awkward stack of crates that is difficult to grip. In what situations is a sack barrow more effective than carrying the load by hand?

questions.prompt: Describe the correct technique for moving a box from the ground to a table.
questions.exampleContext: You must pick up a heavy casting from the floor. Describe the step-by-step posture you should adopt to protect your lower back from strain.
